question: Which genes have label that starts with 'MIR43'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR43' RETURN g.Label AS Gene

question: Which Homo sapiens miRNAs start with 'hsa-miR-2' and have sequences exactly 23 nucleotides long?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-2' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 23 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which GO terms have a label containing 'cell cycle g1' (case-insensitive)?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE toLower(g.Label) CONTAINS 'cell cycle g1' RETURN g.Label AS GOterm

question: List molecular functions whose label ends with 'transporter binding' and that have a long description (more than 20 characters).
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label ENDS WITH 'transporter binding' AND SIZE(mf.Description) > 20 RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, mf.Description AS Description

question: Which phenotypes include 'inflammation' in their label and have at least one synonym with no ASCII letters (A–Z, a-z)?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'inflammation' AND ANY(syn IN p.Synonym WHERE NOT syn =~ '.*[A-Za-z].*') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which diseases have a description that contains the word 'brain' and a label that contains 'virus'? Return the entire nodes (i.e., all their properties).
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'brain' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'virus' RETURN d

question: Which molecular functions have labels containing 'kinase activator'?
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'kinase activator' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Which human miRNAs starting with 'hsa-let-' have sequence lengths between 18 and 25 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-let-' AND SIZE(m.Sequence)>= 18 AND SIZE(m.Sequence) <= 25 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which miRNAs have the genomic coordinates mapped to chromosome X and sequences ending with 'GA'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'GA' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which genes with labels starting with 'MIR' that have genomic coordinates on chromosomes 1 or 2 have at least 5 synonyms?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR' AND SIZE(g.Synonym) >= 5 AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord =~ '^chr(1|2)(:.*)?$') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Synonym AS Synonyms, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which GO terms have label mentioning 'membrane' and description mentioning 'transport', and have at least one synonym?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'membrane' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'transport' AND SIZE(g.Synonym) >= 1 RETURN g.Label AS GOTermLabel, g.Description AS GOTermDescription, SIZE(g.Synonym) AS SynonymCount

question: Which diseases contain 'thyroid' in their label and mention 'carcinoma' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'thyroid' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'carcinoma' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Find cellular components whose description includes 'membrane vesicle'. Return only their labels.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Description CONTAINS 'membrane vesicle' RETURN cc.Label

question: Identify diseases containing 'myocardial infarct' in their label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'myocardial infarct' RETURN d.Label

question: Return Homo sapiens miRNAs whose labels start with 'hsa-miR-1' and sequences end with 'GACU'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-1' AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'GACU' RETURN m.Label, m.Sequence

question: Return GO terms whose labels contain 'kinase inhibitor' and do not contain 'protein'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'kinase inhibitor' AND NOT g.Label CONTAINS 'protein' RETURN g.Label

question: List miRNAs with sequences of at least 100 nucleotides whose genomic coordinates start with 'chr7'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 100 AND ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr7') RETURN m.Label, m.Genomic_coordinates

question: Which human miRNAs start with 'hsa-miR-1' and have sequences at least 25 nucleotides long?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-1' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 25 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which genes contain 'MIR1' (case-insensitive) in their label and have at least one genomic coordinate on chromosome 7?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE toLower(g.Label) CONTAINS 'mir1' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr7') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which GO terms have synonyms mentioning 'transport'? Return their labels and IDs.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE ANY(s IN g.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS 'transport') RETURN g.Label AS GO, g.ID AS GO_ID

question: Which phenotypes have labels containing 'skeletal' (case-insensitive) and exactly 4 synonyms recorded?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE toLower(p.Label) CONTAINS 'skeletal' AND SIZE(p.Synonym) = 4 RETURN p.Label AS PhenotypeLabel, p.Synonym AS PhenotypeSynonym

question: List cellular components whose labels end with 'membrane' and whose descriptions mention mitochondria.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label ENDS WITH 'membrane' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'mitochondria' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Which human miRNAs start with 'hsa-miR-2' and have a sequence length of exactly 24 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species:'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-2' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 24 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: List Homo sapiens precursor miRNAs whose label mentions '19b precursor'. Return only miRNAs' label and their IDs.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE p.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND p.Label CONTAINS '19b precursor' RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, p.ID AS ID

question: Which diseases mention 'tachycardia' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'tachycardia' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which cellular components have 'nucleus' in their label and mention 'membrane' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'nucleus' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'membrane' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Which human miRNAs have labels ending with 'b-3p' and sequences starting with 'A'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH 'b-3p' AND m.Sequence STARTS WITH 'A' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Which genes have labels starting with 'MIR4' and genomic coordinates starting with 'chr7:'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR4' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr7:') RETURN  g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which diseases mention 'tachycardia' in their description and contain 'syndrome' in the label?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'tachycardia' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'syndrome' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which infectious diseases have labels containing 'limbic encephalitis'?
cypher: MATCH (id:Infectious_disease) WHERE id.Label CONTAINS 'limbic encephalitis' RETURN id.Label AS InfectiousDisease

question: List Homo sapiens miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-19' whose sequence ends with 'A' and have genomic coordinates on chromosome 1 (using 'chr1:' to distinguish from decimal coordinates).
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-19' AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'A' AND ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Return GO terms whose Description mentions 'mitochondrial fission'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'mitochondrial fission' RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm, g.Description AS Description

question: Which phenotypes with 'bone' in the label have no recorded synonyms?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'bone' AND (p.Synonym IS NULL OR SIZE(p.Synonym) = 0) RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Retrieve cellular components with label containing 'nucleus' as a stand-alone word.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cellular_component) WHERE c.Label =~ '(?i).*\bnucleus\b.*' RETURN c.Label AS CellularComponent

question: List Homo sapiens miRNAs whose labels end with '3p' and have sequences at least 25 nucleotides long.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label ENDS WITH '3p' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 25 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which genes have at least 20 synonym at least one of them containing the substring 'kinase'? Return genes' label and synonyms.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE SIZE(g.Synonym) >= 20 AND ANY(s IN g.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS 'kinase') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Find GO terms whose descriptions mention 'transmembrane' and that have at least one synonym.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'transmembrane' AND SIZE(g.Synonym) > 0 RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm, g.Description AS Description, g.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which diseases with labels containing 'cardiomyopathy' have descriptions that include 'myocardium'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'cardiomyopathy' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'myocardium' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which human miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-' followed by a number from 1 to 3, have sequences exactly 25 nucleotides long?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label =~ '^hsa-miR-[1-3].*' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 25 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Which diseases mention 'cardiac' in their description and include 'defect' in the label?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'cardiac' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'defect' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which GO terms reference mitochondria in their label and mention 'protein complex' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'mitochondria' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'protein complex' RETURN g.Label AS GO, g.Description AS Description

question: Which human genes with labels starting with 'MIR3' have genomic coordinates on chromosome 1 (using 'chr1:' to distinguish from decimal coordinates)?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR3' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which phenotypes whose labels contain 'tumor' have at least 8 synonyms recorded?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'tumor' AND SIZE(p.Synonym) >= 8 RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which human miRNAs are located on chromosome X (use the property 'Genomic_coordinates' and check if at least one item start with 'chrX') and have sequences ending with 'CU'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'CU' RETURN DISTINCT m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which diseases have labels containing 'dysplasia' and descriptions mentioning 'lethal skeletal'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'dysplasia' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'lethal skeletal' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Find GO terms contain 'apoptosis' in their label.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'apoptosis' RETURN g.Label AS GOterm

question: List human genes whose labels start with 'MIR' and have sequences longer than 200 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR' AND SIZE(g.Sequence) > 200 RETURN g.Label AS Gene, SIZE(g.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: Return GO terms whose label contains 'co-transcription'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'co-transcription' RETURN g.Label AS GOterm

question: Which diseases mention 'cerebellar vermis' in their descriptions?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'cerebellar vermis' RETURN d.Label AS Disease

question: List human miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-' whose sequence length is between 26 and 30 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species:'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 26 AND SIZE(m.Sequence) <= 30 RETURN  m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Identify the molecular functions whose labels spotlight 'kinase binding' but do not contain 'serine/threonine'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'kinase binding' AND NOT mf.Label CONTAINS 'serine/threonine' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Find cellular components that mention 'nucleus' in the label.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'nucleus' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR-2' and ending with 'a-3p' have sequences between 20 and 24 nucleotides long and contain 'AAA' or 'UUU'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-2' AND m.Label ENDS WITH 'a-3p' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 20 AND SIZE(m.Sequence) <= 24 AND (m.Sequence CONTAINS 'AAA' OR m.Sequence CONTAINS 'UUU') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Retrieve human genes with labels starting with 'MIR2' that have genomic coordinates exclusively on chromosome 9.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR2' AND ALL(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr9') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which diseases have descriptions mentioning both 'brain' and 'tumor' but their label does not contain 'brain' (case-insensitive)?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'brain' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'tumor' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'brain' RETURN  d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which GO terms are characterized by a 'Description' property containing the word 'synapt' at least 5 times? List only the GO labels.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE SIZE(split((g.Description), 'synapt')) - 1 >= 5 RETURN g.Label

question: Show all diseases whose description contains 'neuro' and whose label mentions 'dysplasia'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'neuro' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'dysplasia' RETURN d.Label AS Disease

question: List all human miRNAs whose label starts with 'hsa-miR-13' and whose sequence ends with an 'A'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-13' AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'A' RETURN m.Label AS miRNALabel, m.Sequence AS miRNASequence

question: Find the molecular functions that hint 'stress stimuli' in their description. Return all nodes' property (i.e., the entire nodes).
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Description CONTAINS 'stress stimuli' RETURN mf AS MolecularFunction

question: Which human genes starting with 'MIR8' have genomic coordinates exclusively on chromosome 2?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR8' AND ALL(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr2') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates

question: Which GO terms mention 'degranulation' in their label?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'degranulation' RETURN g.Label

question: List diseases with 'connective tissue' mentioned in their label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'connective tissue' RETURN d.Label

question: Find the molecular functions whose descriptions mention 'acetylation'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Description CONTAINS 'acetylation' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Description

question: Find cellular components with labels containing 'mitochondrial derivative'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'mitochondrial derivative' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: List human miRNAs whose labels start with 'hsa-miR-', have sequences exactly 26 nucleotides long, and contain 'GGGG' or 'CCCC'.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA {Species: 'Homo sapiens'}) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 26 AND (m.Sequence CONTAINS 'GGGG' OR m.Sequence CONTAINS 'CCCC') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Return genes whose labels start with 'MIR31' and have genomic coordinates on chromosome 1 or 2 (using 'chr1:' and 'chr2:' to distinguish from decimal coordinates).
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR31' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:' OR coord STARTS WITH 'chr2:') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find GO terms whose labels mention 'transport of viral material t' and descriptions mention 'membrane'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'transport of viral material t' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'membrane' RETURN g.Label AS GO, g.Description AS Description

question: Identify cellular components with labels containing 'mitochondr' and descriptions mentioning 'matrix'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'mitochondr' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'matrix' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: List phenotypes whose labels contain 'myopathy' and that have at least one synonym containing 'minicore'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'myopathy' AND ANY(syn IN p.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'minicore') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which human miRNA have sequence exactly 28 nucleotides long? Return only the miRNAs' label, sequence, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 28 RETURN m.Label, m.Sequence, m.URI

question: What is the average sequence length of human miRNAs whose labels start with 'hsa-miR-2'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-2' RETURN AVG(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS AvgLength

question: What is the average sequence length of human miRNAs whose sequence ends with an 'A'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'A' RETURN AVG(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS AvgLength

question: List GO terms whose labels contain 'synapse-associated' and whose IDs start with 'GO:01'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'synapse-associated' AND g.ID STARTS WITH 'GO:01' RETURN g.Label AS GO, g.ID AS ID

question: Identify phenotypes whose label contains 'cerebellar' and that have at least 10 synonyms.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'cerebellar' AND SIZE(p.Synonym) >= 10 RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which phenotypes have 'cyst' in their label, have at least 10 synonyms, and include at least one synonym that contains non-ASCII letters (A-Z, a-z)?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'cyst' AND SIZE(p.Synonym) >= 10 AND ANY(s IN p.Synonym WHERE s =~ '.*[^a-zA-Z].*') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: List human genes whose labels begin with 'MIR7' and whose sequences exceed 120 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR7' AND SIZE(g.Sequence) > 120 RETURN g.Label AS Gene, SIZE(g.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which phenotypes contain the word 'amputation’ in their label and have synonyms?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'amputation' AND p.Synonym IS NOT NULL RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Which diseases mention 'dysmorphisms' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'dysmorphisms' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: List the label and the ID of all GO terms whose label contain 'apoptosis'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'apoptosis' RETURN g.Label, g.ID

question: Which molecular functions have descriptions matching a pattern that includes 'binding to mrna'?
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Description CONTAINS 'binding to a mrna' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, mf.Description AS Description

question: List cellular components whose description mentions 'preribosom'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Description CONTAINS 'preribosom' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Which miRNAs have sequence length exactly 20 nucleotides and their sequences contains 'GGG' and 'AAA'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'GGG' AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'AAA' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 20 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: How many miRNAs have sequence length exactly 20 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) = 20 RETURN COUNT(m) AS NumberOfmiRNAs

question: How many miRNAs have sequence length greater than 25 nucleotides and do not have 'GGGG' in their sequences?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'GGGG' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) > 25 RETURN COUNT(m) AS NumberOfmiRNAs

question: How many human miRNAs have sequence free from 'AGGGGA' and sequence length less than 20 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'AGGGGA' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) < 20 RETURN COUNT(m) AS NumberOfmiRNAs

question: List precursor miRNAs whose sequences end with 'AU' and whose genomic coordinates include at least one entry starting with 'chr1:'.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE p.Sequence ENDS WITH 'AU' AND ANY(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, p.Genomic_coordinates AS Coordinates, p.Sequence As Sequence

question: Find diseases mentioning 'arrhythmogenic' in their description. Return their label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'arrhythmogenic' RETURN d.Label, d.ID

question: Which Homo sapiens miRNAs have sequences of exactly 22 nucleotides and labels starting with 'hsa-miR-19' and do not end with 'p'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 22 AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-19' AND NOT m.Label ENDS WITH 'p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA

question: Return diseases whose descriptions mention 'cardiac' and whose names contain 'ring'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'cardiac' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'ring' RETURN d.Label AS Disease

question: Identify phenotypes with labels ending in 'deficiency' that have at least one synonym. Return phenotypes' label and their synonym count.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label ENDS WITH 'deficiency' AND SIZE(p.Synonym) >= 1 RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, SIZE(p.Synonym) AS SynonymCount

question: Which Homo sapiens miRNAs are at least 150 nucleotide-sequence long?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) >= 150 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length

question: Return all properties of the diseases containing 'cardiomyopathy 1A' in their label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'cardiomyopathy 1A' RETURN d

question: List GO terms whose descriptions mention 'outer mitochondrial membrane'. Return only the node labels.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'outer mitochondrial membrane' RETURN g.Label AS GO

question: List molecular functions with labels starting with 'ADP'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label STARTS WITH 'ADP' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction

question: Which cellular components contain 'nucleus' in their label?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'nucleus' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: List phenotypes containing 'carcinoma' in the label and that have at least 7 synonyms with at least one synonym containing the word 'karsinomu'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'carcinoma' AND SIZE(p.Synonym) >= 7 AND ANY(s IN p.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS 'karsinomu') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, SIZE(p.Synonym) AS SynonymCount, p.Synonym AS Synonym

question: Which GO terms have descriptions containing 'adaptive immune response'?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'adaptive immune response' RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm

question: Which cellular components with 'cell' in the label have at least one synonym?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'cell' AND SIZE(cc.Synonym) >= 1 RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: How many human miRNAs starting with 'hsa-miR' have exactly 22-nt sequences?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 22 RETURN COUNT(m) AS NumberOfmiRNAs

question: Return GO terms whose label contains 'protein' and that have at least one recorded synonym.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'protein' AND SIZE(g.Synonym) > 0 RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm, SIZE(g.Synonym) AS SynonymCount

question: Retrieve diseases whose clinical descriptions include 'ocular paralysis'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'ocular paralysis' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve the top 2 genes with the highest number of synonyms. In case of ties, order genes alphabetically by gene label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Synonym IS NOT NULL RETURN g.Label AS Gene, SIZE(g.Synonym) AS SynonymCount ORDER BY SynonymCount DESC, Gene ASC LIMIT 2

question: What is the average number of synonyms per gene?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) RETURN AVG(SIZE(g.Synonym)) AS AverageSynonymCount

question: Find the maximum number of characters in a gene label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label IS NOT NULL RETURN MAX(SIZE(g.Label)) AS MaxGeneLength

question: Find the maximum number of characters in a gene label for genes whose labels are a single word.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label IS NOT NULL AND NOT g.Label CONTAINS ' ' RETURN MAX(SIZE(g.Label)) AS MaxGeneLength

question: Return all genes with single-word labels that are exactly 22 characters long.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label IS NOT NULL AND NOT g.Label CONTAINS ' ' AND SIZE(g.Label) = 22 RETURN g.Label AS Gene, SIZE(g.Label) AS NameLength

question: Find genes whose labels contain exactly two hyphens ('-').
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE SIZE(SPLIT(g.Label, '-')) - 1 = 2 RETURN g.Label AS Gene

question: Find genes whose labels start with a single capital letter followed by the word 'gene'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '^[A-Z] gene.*' RETURN g.Label AS Gene

question: Find genes whose labels contain 'coronavirus'. Return their labels and IDs.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'coronavirus' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.ID AS ID

question: What is the average number of characters in gene labels?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) RETURN AVG(SIZE(g.Label)) AS AverageGeneNameLength

question: Which miRNAs have sequences less than 17 nucleotides long and contain at least one 'A'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) < 17 AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'A' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Which miRNAs have sequences less than 17 nucleotides long and contain at least one 'A', 'U', 'C', and 'G'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) < 17 AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'A' AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'U' AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'C' AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'G' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: List precursor miRNAs longer than 120 nt whose labels end with 'precursor'.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(p.Sequence) > 120 AND p.Label ENDS WITH 'precursor' RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, SIZE(p.Sequence) AS Length

question: Find cardiovascular diseases whose descriptions mention both 'tachycardia' and 'gene'.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd.Description CONTAINS 'tachycardia' AND cd.Description CONTAINS 'gene' RETURN cd.Label AS Cardiovascular_disease, cd.Description AS Description

question: Which GO terms contain 'cell' in the label and have at least one synonym?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'cell' AND SIZE(g.Synonym) > 0 RETURN g.Label AS GOTerm, SIZE(g.Synonym) AS SynonymCount

question: Find genes whose label starts with 'MIR9' and that have genomic coordinates on chromosome 1 (chr1:) or X.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR9' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:' OR coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: How many genes have label ending with a letter and at least one genomic coordinate starting with 'chrX'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '.*[A-Za-z]$' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN COUNT(g) AS NumberOfGenes

question: How many genes have label ending with a number and all genomic coordinate starting with 'chrX'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '.*\d$' AND ALL(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN COUNT(g) AS NumberOfGenes

question: Return diseases whose labels contain 'thyroid' and descriptions mention 'autoimmune'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'thyroid' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'autoimmune' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Find miRNAs ending with 'f-3p'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label ENDS WITH 'f-3p' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA

question: Which GO terms have labels that include 'nsulin-like'?
cypher: MATCH (go:GO) WHERE go.Label CONTAINS 'nsulin-like' RETURN go.Label AS GOterm

question: Return phenotypes whose labels contain 'tissue neoplasm'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'tissue neoplasm' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Retrieve human miRNAs whose labels start with 'hsa-miR-' followed by a number from 1 to 5, end with '5p', and have sequences exactly 25 nucleotides long.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Species = 'Homo sapiens' AND m.Label =~ '^hsa-miR-[1-5].*5p$' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) = 25 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: List precursor miRNAs on chromosome X whose sequences end with 'CAA'.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX:') AND p.Sequence ENDS WITH 'CAA' RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, p.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates, p.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Which genes list 'KLF4' (case-insensitive) among their synonyms?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(s IN g.Synonym WHERE toLower(s) CONTAINS 'klf4') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Find GO terms that have a synonym containing 'immunoglobulin'.

question: List human miRNAs whose labels start with 'hsa-miR-2' and whose sequence length is between 18 and 21 nucleotides.

question: List all genes whose labels start with 'MIR31' and that have at least one synonym containing 'microRNA 3171' (case-insensitive).
