cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '.*[^AEIOU]$' RETURN COUNT(g) AS HowManyGenes

question: How many genes have labels that contain 'BRCA'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'BRCA' RETURN COUNT(g)

question: Which phenotypes have labels that end with 'deficiency'?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label ENDS WITH 'deficiency' RETURN p.Label

question: Return diseases whose labels contain 'allergic'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'allergic' RETURN d.Label AS Disease

question: Find diseases whose descriptions include both 'autoimmune' and 'inflammation', excluding those with 'cancer' in the label.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'autoimmune' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'inflammation' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'cancer' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: List all precursor miRNAs that are longer than 120 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(p.Sequence) > 120 RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, SIZE(p.Sequence) AS Length

question: Return diseases whose descriptions mention 'tachycardia' and labels include 'syndrome'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'tachycardia' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'syndrome' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Which GO terms 'Label' contain both 'synapse' and 'assembly'?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'synapse' AND g.Label CONTAINS 'assembly' RETURN g.Label AS GO

question: Which genes have genomic coordinates starting with 'chr9' and whose names end with two letters?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE toString(coord) STARTS WITH 'chr9') AND g.Label=~ '.*[A-Za-z]{2}$' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS Coordinates

question: List precursor miRNAs whose genomic coordinates include chromosome X entries (starting with 'chrX') and whose sequences end with 'AU'.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE toString(coord) STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND p.Sequence ENDS WITH 'AU' RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, p.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: How many genes have at least one genomic coordinate that starts with 'chrX'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE toString(coord) STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS NumberOfGenes

question: Which autoimmune diseases mentioning 'diabetes' have a non-empty description?
cypher: MATCH (a:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE toLower(a.Label) CONTAINS 'diabetes' AND SIZE(a.Description) > 0 RETURN a.Label AS AutoimmuneDisease, a.Description AS Description

question: Return genes have labels starting with 'MIR43' and have genomic coordinates starting with 'chr17'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label STARTS WITH 'MIR43' AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr17') RETURN g.Label AS Gene, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which molecular functions mention 'kinase' in their description and have IDs starting with 'GO:003'? Return only their labels and IDs.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE toLower(mf.Description) CONTAINS 'kinase' AND mf.ID STARTS WITH 'GO:003' RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, mf.ID AS ID

question: Which cellular components contain 'rna' in their label and 'dna' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'rna' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'dna' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve the top 5 single-word gene labels with the shortest length. In case of ties, order genes' labels alphabetically.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE NOT g.Label CONTAINS ' ' RETURN g.Label AS Gene, SIZE(g.Label) AS NameLength ORDER BY NameLength ASC, Gene ASC LIMIT 5

question: Which diseases mention 'breast' in their label and 'uncommon neoplasms' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'breast' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'uncommon neoplasms' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: Find cellular components with 'nucleus' in their label and whose description does not include 'membrane'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'nucleus' AND NOT cc.Description CONTAINS 'membrane' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description AS Description

question: Find diseases with labels containing 'breast' and description containing 'uncommon'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'breast' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'uncommon' RETURN d.Label AS Disease, d.Description AS Description

question: How many GO terms have 'synaptic' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Description CONTAINS 'synaptic' RETURN COUNT(g.Label) AS HowManyGOterms

question: Which infectious diseases have 'fever' in their description and 'virus' in the label (case-insensitive)?
cypher: MATCH (d:Infectious_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'fever' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'virus' RETURN d.Label AS InfectiousDisease, d.Description AS Description

question: List pre-miRNAs with sequences longer than 100 nucleotides whose labels do not end with 'precursor'.
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(p.Sequence) > 100 AND NOT p.Label ENDS WITH 'precursor' RETURN p.Label AS pre_miRNA, SIZE(p.Sequence) AS Length

question: Which diseases have labels that include 'hypertrophic cardiomyopathy' followed by a number?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label =~ '.*hypertrophic cardiomyopathy [0-9]+.*' RETURN d.Label

question: List diseases that have label containing 'adult brain'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'adult brain' RETURN d.Label AS Disease

question: How many different diseases have labels that contain 'intellectual disability'?
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'intellectual disability' RETURN COUNT(d.Label) AS HowManyDiseases

question: Find miRNAs that have long sequences (more than 160 nucleotides). Return their full labels and descriptions.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) > 160 RETURN SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Description AS Description

question: Find miRNAs that have short sequences (less than 17 nucleotides). Return their labels, descriptions, and their sequence and sequence length.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Sequence) < 17 RETURN m.Sequence, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length, m.Label AS miRNA, m.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve the 5 miRNAs with the longest sequences. Return their labels, descriptions, and sequence length. In case of ties, order miRNAs alphabetically by label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Description AS Description, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length ORDER BY Length DESC, miRNA ASC LIMIT 5

question: Find the 5 miRNAs with the shortest sequence. Return their labels, descriptions, and sequence length. In case of ties, order miRNAs alphabetically by label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Description AS Description, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS Length ORDER BY Length ASC, miRNA ASC LIMIT 5

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences do not contain 'A' but do contain the motif 'CCCC' and return their labels and sequences.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'A' AND m.Sequence CONTAINS 'CCCC' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences do not contain the nucleotides 'C' or 'A'. Return all their properties (i.e., the entire nodes).
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'C' AND NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'A' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences contain the motif 'GGGGGGGG' (8 consecutive Gs). Return their labels and sequences.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'GGGGGGGG' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences contain a motif of 7 consecutive Cs. Return their labels and sequence lengths.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'CCCCCCC' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences contain a motif of 18 consecutive Us. Return their labels and sequence lengths.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'UUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences contain a motif of 13 consecutive As. Return their labels and sequences length.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence CONTAINS 'AAAAAAAAAAAAA' RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences do not contain 'G' and contain at least one motif of four identical consecutive nucleotides (A, C or U). Return their labels and sequences.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE NOT m.Sequence CONTAINS 'G' AND (m.Sequence CONTAINS 'AAAA' OR m.Sequence CONTAINS 'CCCC' OR m.Sequence CONTAINS 'UUUU') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence

question: Which miRNAs located on chromosome X have sequences ending with 'GA'?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'GA' RETURN  m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find the average sequence length of miRNAs whose genomic coordinate are located on the chromosome X.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN AVG(SIZE(m.Sequence)) AS AverageSequenceLength

question: Count miRNAs whose genomic coordinates are located on chromosome 1 (using 'chr1:' to distinguish from decimal coordinates).
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT m) AS miRNACount

question: List all miRNAs whose genomic coordinates are located on chromosome Y.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find miRNAs characterized by more than six genomic coordinates. Return their labels and all genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE(m.Genomic_coordinates) > 6 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find the maximum number of genomic coordinates on which any miRNA can be located.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) RETURN MAX(SIZE(m.Genomic_coordinates)) AS MaxChromosomeCount

question: Find miRNAs whose genomic coordinates are located on both chromosome X and chromosome Y. Return their labels and genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences start with 'A', end with 'U', have sequence length greater than 50, and are mapped to chromosome 1 or 2 ('chr1:' and 'chr2:'). Return their labels, sequences, and genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Sequence STARTS WITH 'A' AND m.Sequence ENDS WITH 'U' AND SIZE(m.Sequence) > 100 AND (ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr1:') OR ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr2:')) RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Sequence AS Sequence, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find miRNAs that have more than 2 genomic coordinates on chromosome X. Return their labels and all genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE SIZE([coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX']) > 2 RETURN m.Label AS miRNA, m.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Count pre-miRNAs whose labels contain 'stem-loop'.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label CONTAINS 'stem-loop' RETURN COUNT(pm) AS PreMiRNACount

question: Count pre-miRNAs whose labels do not contain the word 'precursor'. Return their labels.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE NOT pm.Label CONTAINS 'precursor' RETURN COUNT(pm) AS PreMiRNACount

question: Count pre-miRNAs whose labels do not contain the word 'precursor' and do not contain 'stem'. Return their labels and IDs .
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE NOT pm.Label CONTAINS 'precursor' AND NOT pm.Label CONTAINS 'stem' RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA, pm.ID AS ID

question: Retrieve 5 pre-miRNA from the longest sequence. In case of ties, sort alphabetically by label. Return their full labels, descriptions, and sequence length.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) RETURN pm.Label AS pre_miRNA, pm.Description AS Description, SIZE(pm.Sequence) AS Length ORDER BY Length DESC, pre_miRNA ASC LIMIT 5

question: Find the genomic coordinates of pre-miRNAs whose sequence length is exactly 180 nucleotides. Return their labels and genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(pm.Sequence) = 180 RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA, pm.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find the average sequence length of pre-miRNAs whose sequences are between 150 and 180 nucleotides.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(pm.Sequence) >= 150 AND SIZE(pm.Sequence) <= 180 RETURN AVG(SIZE(pm.Sequence)) AS AverageSequenceLength

question: Find the maximum sequence length of pre-miRNAs with at least one genomic coordinate located on chromosome X.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN pm.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') RETURN MAX(SIZE(pm.Sequence)) AS MaxSequenceLength

question: Find the minimum sequence length of pre-miRNAs that are located on chromosome Y.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN pm.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN MIN(SIZE(pm.Sequence)) AS MaxSequenceLength

question: Find miRNAs whose sequences contain a motif of 19 consecutive Us. Return their label, sequences length, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Sequence CONTAINS 'UUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU' RETURN pm.Label AS miRNA, SIZE(pm.Sequence) AS SequenceLength, pm.URI

question: Find all pre-miRNAs whose labels contain '196'. Return their labels and descriptions.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label CONTAINS '196' RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA_Label, pm.Description AS Pre_miRNA_Description

question: Count the number of pre-miRNAs whose labels contain either an opening '(' or a closing ')' parenthesis.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label CONTAINS '(' OR pm.Label CONTAINS ')' RETURN COUNT(pm) AS PreMiRNACount

question: Find all pre-miRNAs whose labels contain '%'. Return their label, description and sequence length.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label CONTAINS '%' RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA_Label, pm.Description AS Pre_miRNA_Description, SIZE(pm.Sequence)

question: Find  the Genomic coordinates where all pre-miRNAs whose labels contain 'to' are located. Return their label and sequences length.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label CONTAINS 'to' RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA_Label, SIZE(pm.Sequence), pm.Genomic_coordinates

question: Count pre-miRNAs that have labels ending with a letter other than 'a', 'b', or 'c' followed by the word 'precursor'.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label =~ '.*[d-z] precursor$' RETURN COUNT(pm) AS PreMiRNACount

question: Which pre-miRNAs have labels that end with one of the letters 'f', 'j', 'h' followed by the word 'precursor'?
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label =~ '.*[fjh] precursor$' RETURN pm.Label

question: Which pre-miRNAs have at least 3 genomic coordinates that start with 'chr21'?
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE([coord IN pm.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr21']) >= 3 RETURN pm.Label AS pre_miRNA, pm.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Find pre-miRNAs characterized by more than five genomic coordinates. Return their labels and all genomic coordinates.
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE SIZE(pm.Genomic_coordinates) > 5 RETURN pm.Label AS Pre_miRNA, pm.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: Which pre-miRNAs have genomic coordinates on both chrX and chrY, and have a sequence shorter than 100 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN pm.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND ANY(coord IN pm.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') AND SIZE(pm.Sequence) < 100 RETURN pm.Label AS miRNA, pm.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates, SIZE(pm.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: Which pre-miRNAs have labels that start with 'Hsa-Let' and what is the length of their sequence?
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE pm.Label STARTS WITH 'Hsa-Let' RETURN pm.Label, SIZE(pm.Sequence)

question: Which pre-miRNAs have labels that do not start with 'microRNA' or 'Hsa', and what is the length of their sequence?
cypher: MATCH (pm:pre_miRNA) WHERE NOT pm.Label STARTS WITH 'microRNA' AND NOT pm.Label STARTS WITH 'Hsa' RETURN pm.Label, SIZE(pm.Sequence)

question: Which genes have labels that contain only consonants and are longer than 5 characters?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '^[BC-DF-GHJ-LMNP-QR-STV-Zbc-df-ghj-lmnp-qr-stv-z]+$' AND SIZE(g.Label) > 5 RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel

question: Which genes have labels that are exactly 2 characters long, and what is the length of their sequence?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE size(g.Label) = 2 RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel, SIZE(g.Sequence)

question: Which genes have labels that start with a letter followed by one or more numbers?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '^[A-Za-z][0-9]+' RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel

question: Which gene has the longest label (ignoring null or empty labels)? In case of ties, select the gene alphabetically.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label IS NOT NULL AND g.Label <> '' RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel, SIZE(g.Label) AS LabelLength ORDER BY LabelLength DESC, GeneLabel ASC LIMIT 1

question: How many genes have a null or empty label?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label IS NULL OR g.Label = '' RETURN COUNT(g) AS NullGeneCount

question: Which genes are short, i.e., having sequences shorter than 50 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE SIZE(g.Sequence) < 50 RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel, SIZE(g.Sequence) AS SequenceLength

question: What is the maximum sequence length among all genes?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) RETURN MAX(SIZE(g.Sequence)) AS MaxSequenceLength

question: What is the minimum sequence length among all genes?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) RETURN MIN(SIZE(g.Sequence)) AS MinSequenceLength

question: What is the average sequence length of genes that have sequence lengths between 20,000 and 1,000,000 nucleotides?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE SIZE(g.Sequence) >= 20000 AND SIZE(g.Sequence) <= 1000000 RETURN AVG(SIZE(g.Sequence)) AS AverageSequenceLength

question: Which genes have labels that start with 'MIR' and end with a number between 4 and 9?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label =~ '^MIR.*-[4-9]+$' RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel

question: Which genes have genomic coordinates on both chrX and chrY?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX') AND ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel, g.Genomic_coordinates AS GenomicCoordinates

question: What is the number of genes whose genomic coordinates located on chrY? What is the average length of their sequence?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(coord IN g.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY') RETURN COUNT(g) AS GeneCount, AVG(SIZE(g.Sequence)) AS AverageSequenceLength

question: How many genes have sequences that do not contain the letter 'U'?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE NOT g.Sequence CONTAINS 'U' RETURN count(g.Label) AS GeneCount

question: Which genes have sequences that contain a stretch of 50 consecutive Ts?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Sequence CONTAINS 'TTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTT' RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel

question: Which genes have sequences containing at least 75 consecutive As? Return only their labels.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Sequence =~ '.*A{75,}.*' RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel

question: Which genes have synonyms containing the Greek symbols α, β, or ɣ? Retun the labels and only the synonyms containing α, β, or ɣ.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE any(syn IN g.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'α' OR syn CONTAINS 'β' OR syn CONTAINS 'ɣ') RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel, [syn IN g.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'α' OR syn CONTAINS 'β' OR syn CONTAINS 'ɣ'] AS GreekSymbolSynonyms

question: List the five genes with the highest number of synonyms. In case of ties, order genes alphabetically.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Synonym IS NOT NULL RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel, SIZE(g.Synonym) AS SynCount ORDER BY SynCount DESC, GeneLabel ASC LIMIT 5

question: Which genes have a description, and what are their descriptions?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Description IS NOT NULL RETURN g.Label, g.Description

question: Return all properties (i.e., the entire node) of the gene labeled as 'gene of Bacteria'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene {Label:'gene of Bacteria'}) RETURN g

question: Which genes contain 'coronavirus' in their label but do not have a reported sequence?
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'coronavirus' AND g.Sequence IS NULL RETURN g.Label AS GeneLabel

question: List all diseases that contain 'covid' in their labels (case-insensitive) but are not classified as infectious diseases.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'covid' AND NOT d:Infectious_disease RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find all diseases whose labels contain 'cancer' (case-insensitive) but are not classified as cancers.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'cancer' AND NOT d:Cancer RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Return all diseases whose labels contain 'animal' but do not contain 'non-human', Return their labels and descriptions.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'animal' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'non-human' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve all properties (i.e., the entire nodes) of diseases whose labels contain 'child' and that are both neurodegenerative and autoimmune.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'child' AND d:Neurodegenerative_disease AND d:Autoimmune_disease RETURN d

question: Find the diseases whose descriptions contain 'rare', 'genetic', and 'autism', and that their node types (i.e., LABELS(Disease)) are classified only as Disease.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'rare' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'genetic' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'autism' AND SIZE(LABELS(d)) = 1 RETURN d.Label

question: List all diseases that contain 'basal ganglia' in their label and show how they are classified (use LABELS(Disease). Return diseases' labels and types.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'basal ganglia' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(d) AS Classifications

question: Retrieve diseases that are classified as neurodegenerative diseases, autoimmune diseases, and cancers.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d:Neurodegenerative_disease AND d:Autoimmune_disease AND d:Cancer RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(d) AS Classifications

question: Retrieve diseases whose descriptions contain 'mid-adolescence' and whose labels contain 'epilepsy'. Return their label, ID and URI.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'mid-adolescence' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'epilepsy' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.ID, d.URI

question: Find epilepsy dog diseases, i.e., diseases whose labels contain 'epilepsy' and 'dog'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'epilepsy' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'dog' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find epilepsy diseases in horses, i.e., diseases whose labels contain both 'epilepsy' and 'horse'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'epilepsy' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'horse' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find diseases whose labels contain 'infantil' and whose label or description contains 'fatal'. Return their label, ID, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'infantil' AND (d.Label CONTAINS 'fatal' OR d.Description CONTAINS 'fatal') RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.ID AS ID, d.URI AS URI

question: Find diseases whose labels contain 'poisoning' and show how they are classified (use LABELS(d)).
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'poisoning' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(d) AS Classifications

question: Find the disease that has the ID 'MONDO:0013150'. Return all its properties (i.e., the entire node).
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {ID: 'MONDO:0013150'}) RETURN d

question: Find the disease characterized by the URI 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/MONDO_0011451'. Return all its properties (i.e., the entire node).
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease {URI: 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/MONDO_0011451'}) RETURN d

question: Find diseases whose URI contains the string 'MONDO_0013472'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.URI CONTAINS 'MONDO_0013472' RETURN d.Label, d.URI

question: Return all diseases whose labels contain 'liver' but do not contain 'polycystic', 'Oliver', or 'infantile', and that are not classified as 'Cancer'. Return diseases' label and type (i.e., LABELS(Disease)).
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'liver' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'polycystic' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'Oliver' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'infantile' AND NOT d:Cancer RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(d) AS Classifications

question: Return all diseases whose labels do not contain 'depletion' nor 'DNA'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'DNA' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'depletion' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Return all diseases whose label or description mention 'rnaseh1 gene'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'rnaseh1 gene' OR d.Description CONTAINS 'rnaseh1 gene' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description AS Description

question: Count all diseases whose descriptions mention both 'gene' and 'mutation'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'gene' AND d.Description CONTAINS 'mutation' RETURN COUNT(d) AS DiseaseCount

question: Find dog and cat diseases, i.e., diseases whose label contains both the words 'dog' and 'cat'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'cat' AND d.Label CONTAINS 'dog' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find cancers whose labels contain 'breast' and also contain 'familial'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'breast' AND c.Label CONTAINS 'familial' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel

question: Find all cancers whose labels contain 'lung' and 'carcinoma'; the latter as a standalone word (i.e., without any prefixes).
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'lung' AND c.Label =~ '.*\bcarcinoma\b.*' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel

question: Find all cancers whose labels contain 'squamous' but do not contain 'carcinoma'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label CONTAINS 'squamous' AND NOT c.Label CONTAINS 'carcinoma' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel

question: Return all properties of the cancer labeled 'lung carcinoma'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer {Label:'lung carcinoma'}) RETURN c

question: Find cancers that have at least three additional disease classification.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE SIZE(LABELS(c)) > 3 RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, LABELS(c) AS Classifications

question: Find cancers that are also infectious diseases and autoimmune diseases.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c:Infectious_disease AND c:Autoimmune_disease RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, LABELS(c) AS Classifications

question: Find cancers that are also autoimmune diseases and also either neurodegenerative diseases or infectious diseases.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c:Autoimmune_disease AND (c:Neurodegenerative_disease OR c:Infectious_disease) RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, LABELS(c) AS Classifications

question: Find cancers whose labels contain the word 'malignant' that are also cardiovascular disease.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c:Cardiovascular_disease AND c.Label CONTAINS 'malignant' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel

question: Find cancers that are cardiovascular disease and whose labels contain the string 'oma'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c:Cardiovascular_disease AND c.Label CONTAINS 'oma' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel

question: Find cancers whose ID ends with the string '743'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.ID ENDS WITH '743' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.ID AS CancerID

question: Find the cancer that has the ID 'MONDO:0200000' and return all its properties (i.e., return the entire node).
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer {ID: 'MONDO:0200000'}) RETURN c

question: Find cancers described as 'extremely rare'. Return their label, ID and URI.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'extremely rare' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.ID AS ID, c.URI AS URI

question: Find cancers whose IDs contain five consecutive zeros.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.ID =~ '.*0{5,}.*' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.ID AS CancerID

question: Find cancers whose description contains the string 'benign polypoid'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'benign polypoid' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.Description AS Description

question: Find cancers whose labels contain the word 'polyp' as a standalone word and whose descriptions do not contain 'benign' or 'non-neoplastic'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Label =~ '.*\bpolyp\b.*' AND NOT c.Description CONTAINS 'benign' AND NOT c.Description CONTAINS 'non-neoplastic' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.Description AS Description

question: Find cancers whose descriptions contain 'precursor lesion', returning their label and Uniform Resource Identifier.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'precursor lesion' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.URI AS CancerURI

question: Find all cancers whose descriptions mention 'controversy'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'controversy' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve the cancers whose descriptions contain 'some authors', return their label and identifier (ID).
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'some authors' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.ID AS ID

question: Find cancers whose label or description contain 'malignant' and whose description contains 'variant'. Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE (c.Label CONTAINS 'malignant' OR c.Description CONTAINS 'malignant') AND c.Description CONTAINS 'variant' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.URI AS CancerURI

question: Find cancers whose descriptions contain the word 'size' and also contain a number followed by 'cm'.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cancer) WHERE c.Description CONTAINS 'size' AND c.Description =~ '.*[0-9]+\s*cm.*' RETURN c.Label AS CancerLabel, c.Description AS Description

question: Which cardiovascular diseases are also classified as 'Infectious_disease'?
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd:Infectious_disease RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(cd) AS Classifications

question: List all the properties for the cardiovascular disease labeled 'Keshan disease'.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease {Label:'Keshan disease'}) RETURN cd

question: Find cardiovascular diseases whose label or description contains the word 'fatal'. Return their label and the ID.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd.Description CONTAINS 'fatal' OR cd.Label CONTAINS 'fatal' RETURN cd.Label, cd.ID

question: Find cardiovascular diseases whose IDs contain five consecutive zeros.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd.ID =~ '.*0{5,}.*' RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel, cd.ID AS DiseaseID

question: Find cardiovascular diseases whose ID ends with '555'. Return all the properties (i.e., return the entire node).
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd.ID ENDS WITH '555' RETURN cd

question: Find cardiovascular diseases whose descriptions mention both 'gene' and 'mutation'. Return the labels and the IDs.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd.Description CONTAINS 'gene' AND cd.Description CONTAINS 'mutation' RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel, cd.ID AS DiseaseID

question: Retrieve the descriptions of the cardiovascular diseases where the gene 'TNNI3' is mentioned (case-insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE toLower(cd.Description) CONTAINS 'tnni3' RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel, cd.Description AS Description

question: Retrieve the labels of cardiovascular diseases whose descriptions mention 'chromosome 22'.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE cd.Description CONTAINS 'chromosome 22' RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: List all cardiovascular diseases whose labels contain 'leber' (case-insensitive) and that are not cancers and return their label and node types (i.e., LABELS(Cardiovascular_disease)) to show how they are classified.
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE toLower(cd.Label) CONTAINS 'leber' AND NOT cd:Cancer RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(cd) AS Classifications

question: List all cardiovascular diseases whose labels contain the string 'noonan' (case-insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (cd:Cardiovascular_disease) WHERE toLower(cd.Label) CONTAINS 'noonan' RETURN cd.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find autoimmune diseases whose labels contain the string 'anemia' and whose descriptions contain the string 'aiha'.
cypher: MATCH (ad:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE ad.Label CONTAINS 'anemia' AND ad.Description CONTAINS 'aiha' RETURN ad.Label AS DiseaseLabel, ad.Description AS Description

question: Find autoimmune diseases whose labels contain 'sclerosis' and whose label or description contains either 'rare' or 'acute'. Return only labels and IDs.
cypher: MATCH (ad:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE ad.Label CONTAINS 'sclerosis' AND (ad.Label CONTAINS 'rare' OR ad.Label CONTAINS 'acute' OR ad.Description CONTAINS 'rare' OR ad.Description CONTAINS 'acute') RETURN ad.Label AS DiseaseLabel, ad.ID AS ID

question: Find autoimmune diseases that are also cancers, and at the same time are also either neurodegenerative diseases or infectious diseases.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE d:Cancer AND (d:Neurodegenerative_disease OR d:Infectious_disease) RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(d) AS Classifications

question: Find autoimmune diseases that are also cancers and whose labels mention the gene 'STAT3'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE d:Cancer AND d.Label CONTAINS 'STAT3' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(d) AS Classifications

question: Return all properties of the autoimmune disease labeled as 'Castleman-Kojima disease'.
cypher: MATCH (ad:Autoimmune_disease {Label:'Castleman-Kojima disease'}) RETURN ad

question: Find all autoimmune diseases whose label contains 'diabete' and whose description mentions the gene 'sumo4' (case-insensitive). Return all the properties for matching nodes.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'diabete' AND toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'sumo4' RETURN PROPERTIES(d)

question: Retrieve the autoimmune diseases whose label contains 'diabete' and whose description mentions 'chromosome 11'. Return their label, description, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'diabete' AND toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'chromosome 11' RETURN d.Label, d.Description, d.URI

question: List the description of all autoimmune diseases whose label contains 'celiac' and whose description is not null.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'celiac' AND d.Description IS NOT NULL RETURN d.Label, d.Description

question: Count how many autoimmune diseases have labels containing 'celiac disease, susceptibility to'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE d.Label CONTAINS 'celiac disease, susceptibility to' RETURN COUNT(d) AS count

question: Find all autoimmune diseases whose labels start with 'anti'. Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (d:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Label) STARTS WITH 'anti' RETURN d.Label, d.URI

question: Retrieve all the properties of the mental disease labeled 'Keshan disease'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease {Label:'phobia'}) RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find all mental diseases whose description mention the 'american psychiatric association'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'american psychiatric association' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find the mental disease whose ID contains '122'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE d.ID CONTAINS '122' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.ID

question: Find all mental diseases whose description mentions 'fear'.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'fear' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find all mental diseases whose description contains 'anxiety' but whose label does not contain 'depress'. Return their label and description.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'anxiety' AND NOT toLower(d.Label) CONTAINS 'depress' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find all mental diseases whose description contains 'consciousness' or 'cognitive'. Return their label, description, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'consciousness' OR toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'cognitive' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description, d.URI

question: Find mental diseases whose description mention the name 'SUE' (case-insensitive) and also contains at least one of 'David', 'Derald', or 'Stanley' (all case-insensitive). Return their label and description.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'sue' AND (toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'david' OR toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'derald' OR toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'stanley') RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find all mental diseases whose description contains the word 'mood' but whose label does not contain 'mood'. Return their label and description.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE d.Description CONTAINS 'mood' AND NOT d.Label CONTAINS 'mood' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find all mental diseases whose description contains the word 'sadness'. Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease) WHERE toLower(d.Description) CONTAINS 'sadness' RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.URI

question: Find the mental disease that has the URI 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/MFOMD_0000001', and return its label and description.
cypher: MATCH (d:Mental_disease {URI: 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/MFOMD_0000001'}) RETURN d.Label AS DiseaseLabel, d.Description

question: Find the infectious diseases whose description mentions 'psychotropic medications', and return its label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Description CONTAINS 'psychotropic medications' RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel, i.ID

question: Find the infectious diseases whose labels contain the word 'tuberculosis' and that are also cardiovascular diseases.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Label CONTAINS 'tuberculosis' AND i:Cardiovascular_disease RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabeltuberculosis, labels(i)

question: Find the infectious diseases whose description contain 'contagious'. Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Description CONTAINS 'contagious' RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel, i.URI

question: Find the infectious diseases whose description contain 'mosquito' or 'fly'. Return their label and the ID.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Description CONTAINS 'mosquito' OR i.Description CONTAINS 'fly' RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel, i.ID

question: Find the infectious diseases whose labels do not ends with 'osis' and whose description contains the word 'mortality' or the word 'death'. Return only disease labels.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE NOT i.Label ENDS WITH 'osis' AND (i.Description CONTAINS 'mortality' OR i.Description CONTAINS 'death') RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find the infectious diseases whose description mention the book 'principles of neurology', and return their label.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Description CONTAINS 'principles of neurology' RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find in which other type of diseases the infectious diseases labeled 'bulbar polio' are classified, and return the diseases' ID and types (use 'LABELS(Infectious_disease)').
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease {Label:'bulbar polio'}) RETURN i.ID, LABELS(i)

question: Find the infectious diseases whose description contains 'asia' but does not contain 'africa'. Return diseases' label.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Description CONTAINS 'principles of neurology' RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Find infectious diseases such that their: 1) labels or description contain 'influenza'; 2) their description contain a number followed by 'day'. Return only the label.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease) WHERE i.Description =~ '.*[0-9]+\s*day.*' AND (i.Label CONTAINS 'influenza' OR i.Description CONTAINS 'influenza') RETURN i.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: Retrieve the description of the 'cardiac tuberculosis'-labeled infectious diseases.
cypher: MATCH (i:Infectious_disease{Label:'cardiac tuberculosis'}) RETURN i.Description

question: List all neurodegenerative diseases whose labels contain 'dementia' but not 'sclerosis'.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Label CONTAINS 'dementia' AND NOT n.Label CONTAINS 'sclerosis' RETURN n.Label AS DiseaseLabel

question: List all neurodegenerative diseases whose labels contain 'sclerosis' but they are not autoimmune diseases nor cancers.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Label CONTAINS 'sclerosis' AND NOT n:Autoimmune_disease AND NOT n:Cancer RETURN n.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(n)

question: List all neurodegenerative diseases whose labels contain 'sclerosis' and they are also either autoimmune diseases or cancers.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Label CONTAINS 'sclerosis' AND n:Autoimmune_disease OR n:Cancer RETURN n.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(n)

question: List all neurodegenerative diseases whose labels or description contain 'chronic' but that are not autoimmune diseases.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE (n.Label CONTAINS 'chronic' OR n.Description CONTAINS 'chronic') AND NOT n:Autoimmune_disease RETURN n.Label AS DiseaseLabel, LABELS(n)

question: Retrieve the description of neurodegenerative diseases whose label contain 'parkinson' (if the node property 'Description' is available).
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Label CONTAINS 'parkinson' AND n.Description IS NOT NULL RETURN n.Label AS DiseaseLabel, n.Description

question: Retrieve all available information (i.e., the entire node) about the neurodegenerative disease labeled 'Huntington disease-like syndrome due to C9ORF72 expansions'.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease {Label: 'Huntington disease-like syndrome due to C9ORF72 expansions'}) RETURN n

question: Retrieve all the available information (i.e., the entire node) about the neurodegenerative disease with the following ID:'MONDO:0002960'.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease {ID:'MONDO:0002960'}) RETURN n

question: Find the neurodegenerative diseases whose labels contain 'Alzheimer' while their description mention the gene PLD3 (case-insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Label CONTAINS 'Alzheimer' AND n.Description CONTAINS 'pld3' RETURN n.Label, n.Description

question: Find the neurodegenerative diseases such that their: 1) labels contain 'epilepsy'; 2) their description mention gene mutation containing the term 'gene' and the term 'mutation'.
cypher: MATCH (n:Neurodegenerative_disease) WHERE n.Label CONTAINS 'epilepsy' AND n.Description CONTAINS 'mutation' AND n.Description CONTAINS 'gene' RETURN n.Label,n.Description

question: List all biological processes whose labels contain 'nitrogen starvation'. Return their full label and also the ID.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'nitrogen starvation' RETURN bp.Label, bp.ID

question: How many biological processes have labels that contain 'negative regulation'?
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'negative regulation' RETURN COUNT(bp)

question: How many biological process nodes are there, what are their labels, and which species are they associated with?
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) RETURN COUNT(bp), LABELS(bp), bp.Species

question: List the labels of all biological process nodes that belong to the species 'Metazoa'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Species = 'Metazoa' RETURN bp.Label

question: Return the species associated with the biological process labeled 'pigmentation'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {Label:'pigmentation'}) RETURN bp.Species

question: Return all properties (i.e., the entire node) of the 'muscle structure development'-labeled biological process.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {Label:'muscle structure development'}) RETURN bp

question: List the labels of all biological processes that belong to the species 'Eumetazoa' and do not contain the word 'regulation' in their labels.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Species = 'Eumetazoa' AND NOT bp.Label CONTAINS 'regulation' RETURN bp.Label

question: Retrieve the description and the species of the biological process labeled as 'female pregnancy'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {Label: 'female pregnancy'}) RETURN bp.Description, bp.Species

question: List all biological processes whose labels contain 'insulin' and also contain either the word 'positive' or 'negative'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'insulin' AND (bp.Label CONTAINS 'positive' OR bp.Label CONTAINS 'negative') RETURN bp.Label

question: List all biological processes whose labels contain 'cardiac muscle' but do not contain either the word 'positive' or 'negative'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'cardiac muscle' AND NOT (bp.Label CONTAINS 'positive' OR bp.Label CONTAINS 'negative') RETURN bp.Label

question: List all biological processes whose label or description contains 'action potential' and whose description contains either the string 'from the soma' or 'towards the soma'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE (bp.Label CONTAINS 'action potential' OR bp.Description CONTAINS 'action potential') AND (bp.Description CONTAINS 'from the soma' OR bp.Description CONTAINS 'towards the soma') RETURN bp.Label, bp.Description

question: Find all biological processes whose labels contain 'blood-brain barrier'. Return their label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'blood-brain barrier' RETURN bp.Label, bp.ID

question: Return all the available properties for the biological process with ID 'GO:0090211'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {ID:'GO:0090211'}) RETURN bp

question: Return the label and description of the biological process with URI 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_0019227'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process {URI:'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_0019227'}) RETURN bp.Label, bp.Description

question: Find biological processes whose labels contain 'bone marrow' and whose descriptions contain 'cell death'. Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Label CONTAINS 'bone marrow' AND bp.Description CONTAINS 'cell death' RETURN bp.Label, bp.URI

question: List all biological processes belonging to the species 'cellular organisms' whose descriptions contain 'steady state'. Return their label, description, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Species = 'cellular organisms' AND bp.Description CONTAINS 'steady state' RETURN bp.Label, bp.Description, bp.URI

question: List all biological processes whose descriptions contain 'level of the cell'. Return the label and the URI.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Description CONTAINS 'level of the cell' RETURN bp.Label, bp.URI

question: List all biological processes whose label or description contains 'blood' and whose description also contains either 'protein' or 'lipid'. Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE (bp.Label CONTAINS 'blood' OR bp.Description CONTAINS 'blood') AND (bp.Description CONTAINS 'protein' OR bp.Description CONTAINS 'lipid') RETURN bp.Label, bp.URI

question: Find all biological processes whose descriptions contain either the string 'progression of the cell' or 'death of the cell'. Return their label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE bp.Description CONTAINS 'progression of the cell' OR bp.Description CONTAINS 'death of the cell' RETURN bp.Label, bp.ID

question: Retrieve labels of all biological processes whose labels contain either the word 'catabolic' or 'metabolic' and whose descriptions contain both the strings 'chemical reactions' and 'receptor'.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process) WHERE (bp.Label CONTAINS 'catabolic' OR bp.Label CONTAINS 'metabolic') AND (bp.Description CONTAINS 'chemical reactions' AND bp.Description CONTAINS 'receptor') RETURN bp.Label

question: Count all GO terms, list their labels, and indicate which species they are associated with.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) RETURN COUNT(g), LABELS(g), g.Species

question: Find the label of all GO terms that are not biological processes, molecular functions, or cellular components, and whose labels contain the word 'inhibitor'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE (g:GO AND NOT g:Biological_process AND NOT g:Molecular_function AND NOT g:Cellular_component) AND g.Label CONTAINS 'inhibitor' RETURN g.Label

question: List the labels and IDs of all GO terms that are not biological processes, molecular functions, or cellular components, and whose labels contain 'anti'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g:GO AND (NOT g:Biological_process AND NOT g:Molecular_function AND NOT g:Cellular_component) AND g.Label CONTAINS 'anti' RETURN g.Label, g.ID

question: Find the classification of GO terms whose IDs start with 'GOCHE'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.ID STARTS WITH 'GOCHE' RETURN DISTINCT LABELS(g) AS Classification

question: Return the distinct classifications of all GO terms whose IDs start with 'GO:'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.ID STARTS WITH 'GO:' RETURN DISTINCT LABELS(g) AS Classification

question: Retrieve labels and URIs of all GO terms that are not biological processes, molecular functions, or cellular components, and whose labels contain the string ' EC' (be careful, there's a space before EC).
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g:GO AND (NOT g:Biological_process AND NOT g:Molecular_function AND NOT g:Cellular_component) AND g.Label CONTAINS ' EC' RETURN g.Label, g.URI

question: List the labels and classifications (i.e., LABELS(node)) of all GO terms whose labels contain both the keywords 'DNA' and 'RNA', and whose label or description also contains the string 'gene silencing'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'DNA' AND g.Label CONTAINS 'RNA' AND (g.Label CONTAINS 'gene silencing' OR g.Description CONTAINS 'gene silencing') RETURN g.Label, LABELS(g)

question: Find the GO terms whose IDs end with '76668'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.ID ENDS WITH '76668' RETURN g.Label, g.ID

question: Retrieve the description of the 'provirus excision' GO term.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO {Label:'provirus excision'}) RETURN g.Description

question: Find all GO terms whose labels contain 'regulation' and whose descriptions contain 'antiviral response'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'regulation' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'antiviral response' RETURN g.Label, g.Description

question: List the labels of GO terms whose labels contain both the strings 'envenomation' and 'negative regulation'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'envenomation' AND g.Label CONTAINS 'negative regulation' RETURN g.Label

question: List GO terms whose label contains the word 'modulation' and also contain either the word 'virus' or 'viral'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'modulation' AND (g.Label CONTAINS 'virus' OR g.Label CONTAINS 'viral') RETURN g.Label

question: Find GO terms whose labels contain the string 'genome replication' but do NOT contain 'regulation' nor 'modulation'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'genome replication' AND NOT (g.Label CONTAINS 'regulation' OR g.Label CONTAINS 'modulation') RETURN g.Label

question: Find how are classified (i.e., use LABELS(node)) GO terms whose labels contain 'genome' but do not contain either 'replication' or 'viral'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'genome' AND NOT (g.Label CONTAINS 'replication' OR g.Label CONTAINS 'viral') RETURN g.Label, LABELS(g)

question: Find GO terms whose labels contain 'plasma', do not contain 'membrane', and are not biological processes.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'plasma' AND NOT g.Label CONTAINS 'membrane' AND NOT g:Biological_process RETURN g.Label, LABELS(g)

question: Find the labels of GO terms whose labels contain 'alcohol', do NOT contain 'regulation', are NOT cellular components, and whose descriptions contain both the words 'catalysis' and '+'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE (g.Label CONTAINS 'alcohol' AND NOT g.Label CONTAINS 'regulation' AND NOT g:Cellular_component) AND g.Description CONTAINS 'catalysis' AND g.Description CONTAINS '+' RETURN g.Label

question: Find GO terms whose labels contain 'dopamine' and whose descriptions contain both the words 'catalysis' and '+'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'dopamine' AND g.Description CONTAINS 'catalysis' AND g.Description CONTAINS '+' RETURN DISTINCT g.Label, g.Description

question: Find labels and IDs of all GO terms whose descriptions mention the small interfering RNAs 'sirnas' (case insensitive).
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE toLower(g.Description) CONTAINS 'sirnas' RETURN g.Label, g.ID

question: List GO terms whose label contains 'transcription' and either 'snoRNA' or 'sno(s)RNA'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'transcription' AND (g.Label CONTAINS 'snoRNA' OR g.Label CONTAINS 'sno(s)RNA') RETURN g.Label

question: List GO terms whose labels contain the word 'miRNA' and also contain either the word 'binding' or the word 'transcription'.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'miRNA' AND (g.Label CONTAINS 'binding' OR g.Label CONTAINS 'transcription') RETURN g.Label

question: Count all molecular functions, their classification, and indicate which species they are associated with.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) RETURN COUNT(mf), LABELS(mf), mf.Species

question: List all molecular functions whose labels contain either the word 'miRNA' or 'snoRNA'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'miRNA' OR mf.Label CONTAINS 'snoRNA' RETURN mf.Label

question: Find molecular functions whose descriptions contain the string 'small nucleolar rna'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Description CONTAINS 'small nucleolar rna' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Description

question: Return all information (i.e., the entire node with all its properties) of the molecular function labeled as 'piRNA cluster binding'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function {Label:'piRNA cluster binding'}) RETURN mf

question: Find labels and URIs of the molecular functions that belong to the species 'Eumetazoa'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Species = 'Eumetazoa' RETURN mf.Label, mf.URI

question: Find the molecular functions that do not belong to the species 'Eumetazoa'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Species <> 'Eumetazoa' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Species

question: List all molecular functions whose labels contain the string 'alcohol O' and whose descriptions contain the string 'catalysis of the reaction'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'alcohol O' AND mf.Description CONTAINS 'catalysis of the reaction' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Description

question: Return the labels of all molecular functions that contain the word 'gene' as a standalone word in their labels.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE  mf.Label =~ '.*\bgene\b.*' RETURN mf.Label

question: Which molecular functions have labels containing 'bone' but descriptions that do not contain 'catalysis'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'bone' AND NOT mf.Description CONTAINS 'catalysis' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Description

question: List the molecular functions that are characterized by a property named 'Synonym'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Synonym IS NOT NULL RETURN mf.Label, mf.Synonym

question: Find the molecular functions such that none of the synonyms is identical to the label.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE NONE(s IN mf.Synonym WHERE s = mf.Label) RETURN mf.Label, mf.Synonym

question: Find labels and URIs of molecular functions whose labels contain the word 'anion' and whose labels or descriptions contain the word 'transmembrane'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'anion' AND (mf.Label CONTAINS 'transmembrane' OR mf.Description CONTAINS 'transmembrane') RETURN mf.Label, mf.ID

question: Find the molecular functions that have label or synonyms containing the term 'monoatomic'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'monoatomic' OR mf.Synonym CONTAINS 'monoatomic' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Synonym

question: Find the molecular function that have a synonym named 'molecular_function'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE 'molecular_function' IN mf.Synonym RETURN mf.Label AS MolecularFunction, mf.Synonym AS Synonyms

question: Retrieve the molecular functions whose IDs end with '0128'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.ID ENDS WITH '0128' RETURN mf.Label, mf.ID

question: List labels of molecular functions whose labels or descriptions contain the string '-gated' and whose descriptions do not start with 'enables'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE (mf.Label CONTAINS '-gated' OR mf.Description CONTAINS '-gated') AND NOT mf.Description STARTS WITH 'enables' RETURN mf.Label

question: List molecular functions whose: 1) labels contain the string 'G-protein'; 2) descriptions contain 'potassium'; and 3) descriptions do not contain 'binding'. Return only their labels.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE (mf.Label CONTAINS 'G-protein' AND mf.Description CONTAINS 'potassium') AND NOT mf.Description CONTAINS 'binding' RETURN mf.Label, mf.Description

question: List all molecular functions whose labels contain the string 'pH' and also contain either the word 'calcium' or 'sodium'.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'pH' AND (mf.Label CONTAINS 'calcium' OR mf.Label CONTAINS 'sodium') RETURN mf.Label

question: List all molecular functions whose labels contain the string 'gated ' without a dash ('-') before it.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'gated ' AND NOT mf.Label CONTAINS '-gated' RETURN mf.Label

question: Find molecular functions that contain the word 'light' without a '-' before or after it.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE mf.Label CONTAINS 'light' AND NOT mf.Label CONTAINS '-light' AND NOT mf.Label CONTAINS 'light-' RETURN mf.Label

question: Find the phenotypes whose: 1) labels contain 'kinase'; 2) descriptions contain 'increased'; and 3) descriptions contain either 'concentration' or 'level'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE (p.Label CONTAINS 'kinase' AND p.Description CONTAINS 'increased') AND (p.Description CONTAINS 'concentration' OR p.Description CONTAINS 'level') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Description

question: Find the phenotypes that are characterized by the Chinese synonym '肌酸磷酸激酶极度上升'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE '肌酸磷酸激酶极度上升' IN p.Synonym RETURN p.Label

question: List the phenotypes that are characterized by a synonym containing the Turkish string 'Aşırı yükselmiş'. Return the phenotype label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE ANY(syn IN p.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'Aşırı yükselmiş') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.ID

question: Which phenotypes are characterized by IDs ending with '0233'?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.ID ENDS WITH '0233' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.ID AS PhenotypeID

question: Return the phenotypes whose labels contain the word 'creatine' and also contain either 'Reduced' or 'Decreased'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'creatine' AND (p.Label CONTAINS 'Reduced' OR p.Label CONTAINS 'Decreased') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Which phenotypes have labels starting with the word 'Anti', contain 'antibody', and do NOT contain 'positivity'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label STARTS WITH 'Anti' AND p.Label CONTAINS 'antibody' AND NOT p.Label CONTAINS 'positivity' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Find the phenotypes whose labels contain the word 'collagen' and also contain either 'Increased' or 'Elevated'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'collagen' AND (p.Label CONTAINS 'Increased' OR p.Label CONTAINS 'Elevated') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Find the phenotypes whose labels contain the word 'collagen' and are characterized by a synonym containing the Spanish string 'Elevación'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'collagen' AND ANY(syn IN p.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'Elevación') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Label, p.Synonym

question: List the phenotypes whose IDs start with 'HP:600000'. Return their label, synonyms, and ID.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.ID STARTS WITH 'HP:600000' RETURN p.Label AS PhenotypeLabel, p.Synonym AS PhenotypeSynonym, p.ID

question: Retrieve labels and URIs of the phenotypes whose labels contain either 'BB' or 'MM'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'BB' OR p.Label CONTAINS 'MM' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.URI

question: Which phenotypes are characterized by synonyms written in non-ASCII characters but that do include the string 'BB'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE ANY(s IN p.Synonym WHERE s =~ '.*[^\x00-\x7F].*' AND s CONTAINS 'BB') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype

question: Which phenotypes have labels containing the word 'isoform' and descriptions that include the standalone terms 'mb', 'bb', or 'mm'?
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'isoform' AND p.Description =~ '.*\b(mb|bb|mm)\b.*' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Description

question: Find the phenotypes whose: 1) labels contain both the words 'muscle' and 'weakness'; 2) descriptions contain the string 'decreased strength'; 3) descriptions do NOT contain the word 'generalized'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'muscle' AND p.Label CONTAINS 'weakness' AND p.Description CONTAINS 'decreased strength' AND NOT p.Description CONTAINS 'generalized' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Description

question: Find phenotypes whose labels contain 'Neck muscle' and whose descriptions do not contain the word 'strength'. Return nodes' label, description, and synonyms.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'Neck muscle' AND NOT p.Description CONTAINS 'strength' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Description, p.Synonym

question: Retrieve the phenotype whose label and synonyms both contain 'Holster'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'Holster' AND ANY(s IN p.Synonym WHERE s CONTAINS 'Holster') RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym

question: Return all the information of the phenotype that has the Spanish synonym 'Fractura de olécranon'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE 'Fractura de olécranon' IN p.Synonym RETURN p

question: Find the phenotypes that have the Spanish synonym 'Fontanela hundida'. Return their label, synonyms, and URI.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE 'Fontanela hundida' IN p.Synonym RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym, p.URI

question: List the description, synonyms, and URI of the phenotype labeled as 'Cotard delusion'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype {Label: 'Cotard delusion'}) RETURN p.Description, p.Synonym, p.URI

question: Find the phenotype whose description mention '(retrieval of eggs for fertility treatments)'. Return the label and the synonym of the identified node(s).
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Description CONTAINS '(retrieval of eggs for fertility treatments)' RETURN p.Label AS Phenotype, p.Synonym

question: Which phenotypes have labels containing the string 'zona pellucida' and descriptions containing either the word 'abnormal' or 'reduced'.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE p.Label CONTAINS 'zona pellucida' AND (p.Description CONTAINS 'abnormal' OR p.Description CONTAINS 'reduced') RETURN p.Label, p.Description

question: Find the cellular components whose labels contain 'protein kinase' and whose descriptions contain 'enzyme'. Return their label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'protein kinase' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'enzyme' RETURN cc.Label, cc.ID

question: Find the cellular components whose labels contain 'intracellular' and whose descriptions contain the string 'a network of proteins'. Return their label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'intracellular' AND cc.Description CONTAINS 'a network of proteins' RETURN cc.Label, cc.ID

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the word 'chromosome' and explicitly refer to chromosome 'X', 'Y', or 'Z' in their label?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'chromosome' AND (cc.Label CONTAINS 'X' OR cc.Label CONTAINS 'Y' OR cc.Label CONTAINS 'Z') RETURN cc.Label, cc.ID

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the standalone word 'active'?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label =~ '.*\bactive\b.*' RETURN cc.Label

question: Which cellular component is characterized by the GO identifier 'GO:0098578'?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component {ID: 'GO:0098578'}) RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the word 'presynaptic' but do not contain the word 'active'? Return nodes' labels and IDs.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'presynaptic' AND NOT cc.Label CONTAINS 'active' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.ID

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing 'lipid' and either have 'oleosins' in their label or in their description? Return only nodes' properties named 'Label' and 'URI'
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'lipid' AND (cc.Label CONTAINS 'oleosins' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'oleosins') RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.URI

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing 'synaptic' and mention a distance expressed as a number followed by 'nm' in their description? Return their label, description and ID.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'synaptic' AND cc.Description =~ '.*[0-9]+\s*nm.*' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description, cc.ID

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the string 'active zone' and either contain the string 'cytoskelet' in their label or in their description? Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'active zone' AND (cc.Label CONTAINS 'cytoskelet' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'cytoskelet') RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.URI

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing 'Golgi' and either contain 'ER' (i.e., an abbreviation for 'Endoplasmic Reticulum') in their label or the full string 'endoplasmic reticulum' in their description (case-insensitive)? Return their label and ID.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE toLower(cc.Label) CONTAINS 'golgi' AND (toLower(cc.Label) CONTAINS 'er' OR toLower(cc.Description) CONTAINS 'endoplasmic reticulum') RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.ID

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the word 'network' and either contain the word 'side' in their label or 'leaflet' in their description?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'network' AND (cc.Label CONTAINS 'side' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'leaflet') RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description

question: Which cellular components have labels containing the string 'host cell' and contain the word 'antibodies' either in their label or in their description?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'host cell' AND (cc.Label CONTAINS 'antibodies' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'antibodies') RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description

question: Return all the available properties (i.e., the entire database node) about the 'presynaptic periactive zone'-labeled cellular component.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component {Label: 'presynaptic periactive zone'}) RETURN cc

question: List the cellular components whose labels contain the keyword 'RNA' preceded by the characters 'm', 't', or 'sn'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label =~ '.*\b(m|t|sn)RNA\b.*' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.ID

question: Find the cellular components whose labels contain the word 'polymerase' followed by a Roman numeral.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label =~ '.*polymerase\s+[IVXLCDM]+.*' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.ID

question: Retrieve the cellular components whose ID starts with 'GO:009857' and whose label does not contain the word 'chromosome'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.ID STARTS WITH 'GO:009857' AND NOT cc.Label CONTAINS 'chromosome' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.ID

question: Find the cellular components whose labels or descriptions contain the word 'leaflet', but whose labels and descriptions do not contain 'lumen'.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE (cc.Label CONTAINS 'leaflet' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'leaflet') AND NOT (cc.Label CONTAINS 'lumen' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'lumen') RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.Description

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the acronym 'PML' (case-insensitive) or descriptions containing the full string 'promyelocytic leukemia'? Return their label and URI.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE toLower(cc.Label) CONTAINS 'pml' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'promyelocytic leukemia' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent, cc.URI

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the word 'matrix' and descriptions containing either the string 'extracellular' or 'synaptic cleft'? Return their labels.
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label CONTAINS 'matrix' AND (cc.Description CONTAINS 'extracellular' OR cc.Description CONTAINS 'synaptic cleft') RETURN cc.Label

question: Which cellular components are characterized by labels containing the word 'DNA' preceded by a lower-case character, such as 'rDNA'?
cypher: MATCH (cc:Cellular_component) WHERE cc.Label =~ '.*[a-z]DNA.*' RETURN cc.Label AS CellularComponent

question: Which miRNA are characterized by genomic coordinates located on the positive strand of the chromosome Y (e.g., chrY:123-132+) ?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrY' AND coord ENDS WITH '+') RETURN m.Label, m.Genomic_coordinates

question: Which pre-miRNA have genomic coordinate located on the negative strand of the chromosome 21 (i.e., the coordinates end with '-') ?
cypher: MATCH (p:pre_miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN p.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chr21' AND coord ENDS WITH '-') RETURN p.Label, p.Genomic_coordinates

question: Which miRNAs are located on chromosome X and are characterized by genomic coordinates on both the positive and negative strands (chromosome ends with '+' and '-')?
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX' AND coord ENDS WITH '+') AND ANY(coord IN m.Genomic_coordinates WHERE coord STARTS WITH 'chrX' AND coord ENDS WITH '-') RETURN m.Label, m.Genomic_coordinates

question: Identify genes that are pseudogenes characterized by a synonym containing: 1) the word 'pseudogene' and 2) the word 'DEAD'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(syn IN g.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'pseudogene' AND syn CONTAINS 'DEAD') RETURN g.Label, g.Synonym

question: Identify genes that have a synonym containing 'DEAD' but do not have the word 'pseudogene' within the same synonym.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(syn IN g.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'DEAD' AND NOT syn CONTAINS 'pseudogene') RETURN g.Label, g.Synonym

question: Identify genes that have a synonym containing 'ribosomal' and are not pseudogenes (i.e., they do not have 'pseudogene' in their synonym). Return the genes' label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(syn IN g.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'ribosomal' AND NOT syn CONTAINS 'pseudogene') RETURN g.Label

question: Identify genes that have a synonym containing the word 'cancer' and also contain either the word 'antigen' or 'isomerase'.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE ANY(syn IN g.Synonym WHERE syn CONTAINS 'cancer' AND (syn CONTAINS 'antigen' OR syn CONTAINS 'isomerase')) RETURN g.Label, g.Synonym

question: Find all genes whose label contains the symbol 'MIR127' and order them by sequence length, breaking ties alphabetically by label.
cypher: MATCH (g:Gene) WHERE g.Label CONTAINS 'MIR127' RETURN g.Label, SIZE(g.Sequence) AS sequence_length ORDER BY sequence_length DESC, g.Label ASC

question: Find all miRNAs whose label start 'hsa-miR-199' and order them by sequence length, breaking ties alphabetically by label.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE m.Label STARTS WITH 'hsa-miR-199' RETURN m.Label, SIZE(m.Sequence) AS sequence_length ORDER BY sequence_length DESC, m.Label ASC
